memory.hypothesis: Reducing critical-path latency should improve trial conversion
memory.change: Ranked p95 latency as the first optimization focus
memory.outcome: Latency improved in the snapshot while conversion moved up
memory.feedback: Need better attribution between latency and conversion
memory.shortcoming: Current snapshot is aggregate-only and lacks segment attribution

memory.hypothesis: Segment-level latency work should further improve conversion
memory.change: Recorded attribution gap as the next instrumentation task
memory.outcome: All primary KPIs moved in the desired direction
memory.shortcoming: Manual KPI entry remains a source of lag and error
memory.next_bet: Connect the loop to production analytics exports
memory.guardrail_notes: Guardrails still need direct snapshot capture

memory.hypothesis: A tighter dashboard and persistent experiment memory should make each loop more actionable.
memory.change: Exercised @autoresearch MCP flow end to end as Codex.
memory.outcome: Profile, snapshot, plan, memory, and dashboard render all completed.
memory.feedback: Next gap is packaging validation against the exact Codex submission process.
memory.shortcoming: The plugin still depends on the user enabling browser/plugin surfaces in Codex.
memory.next_bet: Add submission assets and marketplace metadata once requirements are final.
memory.guardrail_notes: No guardrail regression in smoke-test values.
